title: coffea commersoniana
intro: Coffea commersoniana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to Madagascar, and is a member of the coffee family. It has been reported to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Coffea commersoniana include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve blood circulation, making it a sought-after herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Coffea commersoniana often include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
